title: Implement bullet tick loop skeleton + position advancement + range check + unloaded chunk handling

reference_files.reason: Bullet flight + collision - per tick: position advancement by bullet_speed along direction (no gravity), range check (exceed range -> onExpire), unloaded chunk handling (direct onExpire, no force load)
Step 10: Bullet flight and hit (async) - onTick per tick, onExpire on range exceeded, onRemove on any removal

acceptance_criteria: BulletTickHandler created (server-side tick listener on NeoForge.EVENT_BUS via TickEvent.LevelTickEvent or ServerLevel tick)
tickBullets(Level level) method iterates all active bullets in BulletManager for that dimension
Per bullet: increment age (bulletRecord.age++), call position advancement (position = position + direction * bullet_speed)
Position advancement uses bullet_speed from snapshot.getStat(BULLET_SPEED), direction from bulletRecord.getDirection()
Range check: if traveledDistance + stepLength > range (from snapshot), trigger onExpire + remove with RemoveReason.EXPIRED (hook calls may be TODO placeholders for subtask 14)
Unloaded chunk check: if bullet's current chunk is not loaded (level.hasChunk(chunkX, chunkZ) returns false), trigger onExpire + remove with RemoveReason.UNLOADED_CHUNK
Chunk bucket migration called when bullet crosses chunk boundary (delegates to BulletManager.updateChunkBucket)
TODO placeholder comments left for collision detection (subtask 10), penetration (subtask 11), damage (subtask 12), hooks (subtask 14)
Traveled distance accumulated per tick (traveledDistance += stepLength)
